seoTitle: How to Edit a Header in Elementor for Free in 2026
metaDescription: Think you need Elementor Pro to customize your header? Here's how to build and edit a custom header and footer using free tools and theme builders.
intro: A common misconception among WordPress beginners is that editing a header requires Elementor Pro, but a free plugin combined with the right theme builder setup can get you there. This guide covers customizing menus, logos, icons, and a sticky header, plus building a matching footer, all without a paid upgrade. It works across popular themes like Astra, GeneratePress, OceanWP, and Hello Theme.

steps.heading: Understand how header editing works in Elementor
steps.body: Elementor's free version doesn't include a built-in theme builder, which is why a separate free plugin is needed to unlock header and footer editing.

steps.heading: Install a free plugin for header and footer editing
steps.body: Add a free theme-builder-style plugin that integrates with Elementor so you can design custom headers and footers without upgrading to Pro.

steps.heading: Create your custom header
steps.body: Use the plugin's header template area to build your header layout inside the familiar Elementor drag-and-drop editor.

steps.heading: Add your navigation menu, logo, and buttons
steps.body: Fill in your header with a navigation menu, logo, and any call-to-action buttons, adjusting styling to fit your site's theme.

steps.heading: Build and publish your footer
steps.body: Repeat a similar process for the footer, using the free plugin's footer template area, then publish both so they appear across your site.

faq.question: Do I really need Elementor Pro to edit my header?
faq.answer: No — a free plugin that adds theme-builder functionality lets you fully customize and edit your header without upgrading to Elementor Pro.

faq.question: Does this method work with any WordPress theme?
faq.answer: It's compatible with popular themes including Astra, GeneratePress, OceanWP, and Hello Theme, which covers most common Elementor setups.

faq.question: Why isn't my header showing or updating after I edit it?
faq.answer: This is a known issue that can happen with header editing in Elementor, and it's typically resolved by checking the template's display conditions and clearing cache.

faq.question: Can I add a sticky header using the free method?
faq.answer: Yes, sticky header setup is covered as part of customizing your header once you have the free theme-builder plugin installed.
